task: Fix full surah playback by changing default reciter
details: Changed default reciter from ar.alafasy to ar.abdulbasitmurattal in QuranPlayer.ts, audioPlayer.js, and settings.js to support full surah playback

task: Analyze the Quran player codebase
details: Analyzed the Quran player implementation to understand the architecture and identify issues

task: Identify the issue with listener section (wrong surah number being sent)
details: Found that showPlaybackOptionsModal wasn't storing the selected surah, causing playback to default to surah 1

task: Fix showPlaybackOptionsModal to store selected surah
details: Added this.currentSurah = surah; in showPlaybackOptionsModal() method

task: Fix the playNextAyah method call and logic

task: Add better error handling and logging
details: Added comprehensive console logging throughout the audio playback flow and validation checks

task: Test both full-surah and ayah-by-ayah playback modes
details: Verified both playback modes work correctly through VS Code extension debugging

task: Add handleMessage method to AudioPlayerComponent
details: Added handleMessage() method to AudioPlayerComponent to receive playAudio messages from extension

task: Fix JavaScript error 'updateAutoPlaySetting is not defined'
details: Fixed 17 inline event handlers in activityBar.html that were calling settings methods globally instead of through window.quranActivityBar.settingsComponent.methodName()

task: Implement specific auto-reading speed intervals
details: Implemented auto-reading speeds with specific intervals: slow=8s, normal=4s, fast=2s, very fast=1s, default=4x (0.5s intervals). Updated both JavaScript logic and HTML UI controls.
